subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends and true companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Though the affliction of plague hath encompassed all regions of the Holy Land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان معنوی و یاران حقیقی عبدالبهاء هر چند آفت وبا جمیع انحاء اقلیم مقدس
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @civil courts, @critique of Western values; culture, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
